      -------------------------------------------------------------------
                        STM32CubeProgrammer v2.22.0
      -------------------------------------------------------------------

ST-LINK SN  : 066BFF514852898767094734
ST-LINK FW  : V3J11M3
Voltage     : 3.28V
SWD freq    : 4000 KHz
Connect mode: Normal
Reset mode  : Software reset

Error: No STM32 target found! Please check that:
        - the board is properly connected.
        - the SWD pins are not disconnected.
        - the target device is supplied with valid voltage.
